DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2017 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jane Feng, in pro per, Tel. 415.876.6703, for plaintiffs;
Jerry R. Hauser, of Miller Hauser Law Group, LLP, Tel. 415.485.2200, for defendant Yang, appearing via CourtCall;
Interpreter: Daniel Hsueh, Tel. 408.707.7524, Santa Clara Court, Cert. 100732.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DAVID YANG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT as to the sole cause of action for fraud in the complaint filed on January 25, 2017, by plaintiff Jane Feng is sustained without leave to amend. The face of the complaint shows that the fraud claim is barred by the three-year statute of limitations of CCP 338(d). The fraud claim is based on statements Chen Hang made on October 6, 2010, more than three years before this case was filed. It does not appear that it is reasonably possible that Ms. Feng will be able to remedy the statute of limitations issue by an amended complaint. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
